hero.title: Web & Game Developer
hero.intro: I'm Lorenzo Censi, a computer science student at Sapienza University, currently {{age}} years old. I work as a web developer using Drupal, I'm also a game programmer in Unity in my spare time, and the creator of websites like the one you’re currently viewing.

aboutPage.title: About me
aboutPage.intro: Hi! I'm Lorenzo Censi, {{age}} years old, and I love experimenting with the web and videogames.
aboutPage.webText: I design and build modern sites using React and Drupal.
aboutPage.gameText: In my spare time I make prototypes with Unity and other technologies.
